body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c647e/24c69fd9/ca327489/18e600e2/3183816450/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE710N_digital_email_20170713_RTWBigInvestment_inact&source=WQEFE710N_digital_email_20170713_RTWBigInvestment_inact")
---

Peter,

When thousands of women started reaching out after Election Day to tell us they wanted to run for office, we knew we had to make our biggest investment EVER to help them run.

That's why we launched Run to Win, and since then this community has stepped up big time to make sure it's a success.

Here's where your support is going: Since February, we've tripled our state and local staff and doubled our budget for state and local races. We brought on not one or two, but _eight_ regional directors and two finance advisors to counsel the thousands of women who are ready to put their name on the ballot for the first time.

**[This has only been possible because of the enthusiasm and generosity of the EMILY's List community. Want to see even more? Donate $3 to help continue to grow Run to Win.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c647e/24c69fd9/ca327489/18e600e3/3183816450/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170713_email_RTWBigInvestment?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+This+has+only+been+possible+because+of+t&utm_campaign=WQEFE710N_digital_email_20170713_RTWBigInvestment_inact&source=WQEFE710N_digital_email_20170713_RTWBigInvestment_inact")**

It doesn't end there!

Over the last few months, we've also hired a brand-new Run to Win program director, are bringing on new Run to Win digital staff, and we're building out my training team so that we can teach thousands of women the nuts and bolts of running for office. We launched our most extensive training schedule to date in more than 25 cities across the country, AND we'll be doing training webinars for the first time.

Thanks to the enthusiasm of our grassroots community, we've been able to help train hundreds of women so far. But we still have _thousands_ more to go.

**Donate $3 now to keep this program growing -- together we can help elect more women than ever before:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Grow-Run-To-Win](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c647e/24c69fd9/ca327489/18e6031c/3183816450/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170713_email_RTWBigInvestment?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgGrowRunToWin&utm_campaign=WQEFE710N_digital_email_20170713_RTWBigInvestment_inact&source=WQEFE710N_digital_email_20170713_RTWBigInvestment_inact")**

Thanks and talk to you soon,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Vice President of National Outreach and Training, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c647e/24c69fd9/ca327489/18e6031d/3183816450/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170713_email_RTWBigInvestment?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE710N_digital_email_20170713_RTWBigInvestment_inact&source=WQEFE710N_digital_email_20170713_RTWBigInvestment_inact")

name: Keith Ellison
subject: TOMORROW: Be part of our national Resistance Summer Day of Action
body:
Join a Resistance Summer event near you.
---
Derek --

Tomorrow, I, along with Democrats in Virginia and across the country, will be hitting the pavement to talk to our neighbors -- it's our national Resistance Summer Day of Action.

**[This is critically important, and we're going to have a lot of fun, too. So grab your friends, lace up your tennis shoes, and commit to canvass tomorrow with our new, easy-to-use Knock 10 app.](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/commit-to-canvass1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+This+is+critically+important+and+were+go&utm_campaign=em_20170714_ke_ne&source=em_20170714_ke_ne")**

Resistance Summer is all about bringing our communities together to stand up to those who want to rig the system against working families. Whether that means stopping the Senate Republicans' health care repeal bill, taking on Betsy DeVos' attacks on public education, or fighting back against whatever the GOP is up to at the state and local level, we're resisting.

But it's not all about holding Trump accountable. We also need to elect Democrats who will put the middle class and working families first. So we need everyone who can to stand up and be a voice for Democratic values tomorrow -- expanding opportunity, better wages, affordable health care, and secure retirement. Let's hit as many doors and reach as many voters as we can. There's too much on the line not to go all-in.

**Commit to canvass tomorrow during our Resistance Summer Day of Action:**

**[RSVP](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/commit-to-canvass1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+RSVP&utm_campaign=em_20170714_ke_ne&source=em_20170714_ke_ne")**
Thanks,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deptuy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232c7/4067b0a/37ae2a173/7e6ab034/229065973/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170714_ke_ne&source=em_20170714_ke_ne"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232c7/4067b0a/37ae2a173/7e6ab035/229065973/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170714_ke_ne&source=em_20170714_ke_ne"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232c7/4067b0a/37ae2a173/7e6ab032/229065973/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170714_ke_ne&source=em_20170714_ke_ne") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232c7/4067b0a/37ae2a173/7e6ab033/229065973/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170714_ke_ne&source=em_20170714_ke_ne"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: The White House
subject: The time to Repeal and Replace Obamacare is NOW
body:

Today's Events

(All times EST)

4:10 AM President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump participate in the French National Day Parade with President and Mrs. Macron

6:45 AM President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump depart Paris, France en route to Newark, New Jersey

1:15 PM Vice President Pence delivers remarks at the National Governors Association Summer Meeting

2:00 PM Vice President Pence participates in a series of meetings with governors

2:45 PM Vice President Pence participates in a bilateral meeting with Prime Minister Justin Trudeau of Canada

3:30 PM Vice President Pence participates in a series of meetings with governors

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and President Emmanuel Macron | July 13, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY

FACT: Taxpayers are on the hook for Obamacare’s surging costs. The average Obamacare subsidy in February 2017 was nearly
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=289aa87802850279ac270ad95f7150442d0d655665520eacf7e49008033b03887fce78ef7a6f49673730d2bfe7bccfc44161dd695b451f57
$4,500 – an increase of nearly $1,200 from just two years prior.

President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump participated in a viewing of the National Day Parade in France in honor of Bastille Day. President Trump is

the first United States President to participate in the ceremonies since 1989.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=289aa87802850279342bdcc51f14160c56869e90840266159b42f95c351e8f49a7609ebaadb9b6de3f71b8fb9200a90818f992213b703557
arrival ceremony at Les Invalides and a

Follow the President's trip to France,
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=289aa87802850279d131747625d107c7fb41dbeb782a1c77747cd93bf0250ea9955a86134d5ce8039f78a9b34592aca336bf56679d1ad284

Facebook, and

Twitter.

Vice President Pence delivered remarks on Obamacare in Lexington, Kentucky on Wednesday saying, "it’s going to take courage, and it’s going to take leadership in Washington, D.C. And make no mistake about it, there are many voices in our Nation’s Capital, and you see them on TV all the time.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: fwd: steal his thunder ⚡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

As of yesterday, we officially have a challenger. Democrats immediately stepped up -- and you helped us blow through our 500-supporter goal!

**So we're running with this momentum and increasing our goal for maximum impact.[Will you pitch in and help us get to 1,000 grassroots donations?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Hlm%2FiPNpMTxdmYu9kGaFOK7Qp5rjz8%2Ff)**

\- Tim

_\---original message---_
SUBJ: steal his thunder
SENDER: Team Kaine

**BREAKING NEWS: Corey Stewart announces Senate bid**
Big news, friend. Failed Republican gubernatorial candidate **Corey Stewart just announced he is going to challenge Tim for his Senate seat in 2018** , saying "I'm going to run a very vicious and ruthless campaign against Tim Kaine."

Corey Stewart is an extremist who called himself "Trump before Trump was Trump" and ran a campaign based on fear and intolerance. But he _almost_ defeated Ed Gillespie for the Republican gubernatorial nomination -- showing Republicans could unite around his dangerous agenda.

Starting today, Stewart plans on building a movement of right wing activists in Virginia. We need your help to show that our Commonwealth is more interested in creating economic opportunity for all than electing a candidate who rubber stamps Donald Trump's divisive agenda.

**[Will you help us hit our goal of reaching 500 grassroots donations by midnight tonight, on the first day of Stewart's campaign?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=m9jmbFC9omaQA%2FNPVyqw%2F67Qp5rjz8%2Ff)**

| | Peter,

After weeks of working in secret, Senate Republicans released a new version of their bill to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and frankly, it's just more of the same.

This bill:
* Still guts Medicaid
* Still allows premiums to be up to five times more expensive for seniors
* Still lets insurance companies cancel your coverage when you need it most
* And it _still_ makes it harder for states like Indiana to fight the opioid epidemic

**Republicans and their dark-money donors know that I'm going to fight this bill every step of the way, which is why they've singled me out as a top target in 2018.[Can you chip in $5 to my campaign today so I can stay in the Senate and keep fighting for you?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2683/7377f838/36ea7119/51fb0134/696298126/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170714ndresend&amount=10")**

This isn't a health care bill -- it's a wealth transfer bill, heaping tax cut after tax cut on the ultra rich and taking crucial benefits from middle- and working-class Americans to pay for it. And maybe I sound like a broken record, but I want you to know: **I don't support this bill or _any_ bill that will cause Hoosiers to lose their coverage.**

Peter, Republicans are practically salivating at the chance to replace me with someone who will be a rubber stamp for their extreme agenda. **[We can beat them, but we have to do it together. Will you chip in $5 to my campaign today?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2683/7377f838/36ea7119/51fb0134/696298126/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170714ndresend&amount=10")**

Thank you,

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Ben Jealous for Maryland
body:
As President of the NAACP, he built coalitions to support marriage equality
#
Friends,
I am excited that Our Revolution is endorsing Ben Jealous for governor of Maryland. Ben's campaign has only just begun, but he has already generated tremendous grassroots energy and momentum that we can all get excited about.
Ben is a servant leader who has been committed to social, racial, and economic justice for his entire life. As President of the NAACP, he built coalitions to support marriage equality, immigrants' rights, the environment, and labor groups, worked to abolish the death penalty and get big money out of politics.
Ben is a passionate advocate for a $15 minimum wage, ending mass incarceration, and a Medicare for All system. These are not just political calculations for him. This is what he believes and I know he will work to make these policies a reality.
**[Join me in supporting Ben's campaign by making a $3 contribution today. Together, we can showcase our positive, progressive vision for this country and lead the way to victory in the Maryland gubernatorial election.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-jealous?refcode=em170714-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-jealous?refcode=em170714-full")**
Ben's campaign is an opportunity we must take to improve people's lives and the communities where they live. With Ben Jealous as governor of Maryland, we can stop the school-to-prison pipeline and address the growing opioid crisis. We can make college tuition affordable, protect our environment, and ensure that people can get a good paying job instead of scraping together income from two or three jobs paying starvation wages.
This isn't just about Ben's campaign, this is about improving the lives of everyday Americans, starting in Maryland. [**Please make a donation to Ben's campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-jealous?refcode=em170714-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-jealous?refcode=em170714-full")
Together we have the power to make change. Let's show the people of this country what real grassroots energy can do.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
**_Next Level Roads / Congress of Counties Survey_**
Governor **Eric Holcomb** launched Indiana's Next Level Roads Plan this week. The $4.7 billion, 5-year plan will upgrade thousands of miles of Hoosier highways and roads, and there's more to come thanks to the 20-year plan passed during our latest legislative session. You can learn more about the announcement and see exactly which roads are on the list below.

In addition, I want to personally ask you to [participate in a short survey](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f6d785d674&e=1acd9bb3d6) we created to help us plan for this year's Congress of Counties. Historically held in odd-numbered years, Congress of Counties is a two-day training held to equip our top activists, volunteers and leaders with the tools and technology they need to succeed. To make this year's event the best yet, [we need to hear from you](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bad0136e5d&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

Please take a few moments to [share your thoughts](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d370e5ec3&e=1acd9bb3d6) on where Congress of Counties should be held and what should be included in the programming so we can better prepare for an enjoyable and informative weekend this fall.

Don't forget [Governor Holcomb's Sporting Clay Shoot](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4ecf377817&e=1acd9bb3d6) with First Lady **Janet Holcomb** & Colts Kicker **Adam Vinatieri** taking place on Tuesday! For more information, contact Zach Willis at zachwillis@holcombforindiana.com. This event benefits Team Holcomb, the joint fundraising committee for the Indiana Republican Party and Eric Holcomb for Indiana.
\- Kyle
---
|
---
| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
|
---
As mentioned above, Governor Holcomb put tires to pavement this week as he made stops in [Indianapolis](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=07d6e725b2&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Lafayette](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d154544e4c&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Terre Haute](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7bb3e6095c&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Evansville](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=507a7ae911&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Sellerburg](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2991058fab&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- with extra stops in [Covington](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6d4cd5bf57&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Bruceville](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bc5a31a7ca&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- to unveil Indiana's [Next Level Roads Plan](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3f2a1bc4d5&e=1acd9bb3d6)! The first 5 years of our 20-year infrastructure plan will invest $4.7 billion on Indiana's roads and bridges. A total of 122 lane miles will be added, 9,628 lane miles will be resurfaced and 1,295 bridges will be rehabbed or replaced. In addition to scheduled work on state roads, the plan calls for an additional $342 million annually to be invested in local city, county and town infrastructure.

_**This long-term, sustainable, data-driven infrastructure plan is fully funded and will maintain Indiana's position as the Crossroads of America for generations to come. **_

Find out which projects are coming to your county by checking out the full Next Level Roads Plan [here.](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=85c62e6b76&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| _**Health Care Update**_
Senate Majority Leader **Mitch McConnell** unveiled the latest version of the Better Care Reconciliation Act on Thursday. As Senator McConnell and others said, the initial bill was a 'discussion draft' and this revamped legislation includes some important provisions that have been included based on those discussions. These additions include:

**More Help to Cover Out-of-Pocket Costs** : An additional $70 billion is dedicated to encouraging state-based reforms, which could include help with driving down premiums through cost-sharing, Health Savings Accounts (HSA), and other innovative ideas to help pay for health care costs. This is in addition to the $112 billion in funding already in the original bill.

**Health Savings Accounts to Pay for Premiums** : In order to ensure that more people have financial support to pay for health care costs, a provision has been included in the bill that would, for the first time, allow people to use their HSAs to pay for their premiums. This is a policy that both the Joint Committee on Taxation (JCT) and the Congressional Budget Office (CBO) say will increase health care coverage.

**Additional Resources to Combat the Opioid Epidemic** : With the opioid crisis hitting Americans in every state, an additional $45 billion is dedicated for substance abuse treatment and recovery.
